title: Bridge Essay: Extending the motivational model of love: A Goal-Directed Predictive Processing perspective.
concept: Emptiness from predictive processing — the self as inference, dependent arising as Bayes-optimal perception.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness from predictive processing — the self as inference, dependent arising as Bayes-optimal perception.

**Extending the motivational model of love: A Goal-Directed Predictive Processing perspective.** - The Behavioral and brain sciences (2026). DOI: 10.1017/S0140525X25102161. PMID: 42203750. We extend Kruglanski et al.'s model by embedding it within a Goal-Directed Predictive Processing framework. This perspective conceptualizes romantic love as arising from self-referential inferences tied to personal goals and reveals that love may include merit, appreciation, and significance, but is not defined or limited by them. It also explains love experiences that exceed the scope of the authors' model. We extend Kruglanski et al.'s model by embedding it within a Goal-Directed Predictive Pr
